title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Dock Workers (Regulation of Employment) Act, 1948. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1[except the State of Jammu and Kashmir*].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule, for "except part B States". *. *Vide* Notification No. S.O. 3912 (E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
